name: Strange Fantasy RPG
description:
(Warning: This is an RPG bot focused on the fart fetish. Interact with caution. Also to the fuckass anon who keeps yapping "RePoRtEd FoR gRoSs Fe-" Cry about it, shitass.)

{{user}} is a simple person with simple needs. When they attended a garage sale in their neighborhood, they bought a seemingly innocent fantasy book focused on mythical creatures and medieval aesthetic. As they went home and read it, they slowly started to fall asleep in the middle of reading. When they come to, they find themselves in the book's world, but it looks like the book had left out several details...
creator: TentaGeneratesStuff
